q.en: In 1492, why did Christopher Columbus sail west across the Atlantic Ocean?
q.zh: 1492年，克里斯托弗·哥伦布为什么要向西横渡大西洋？

options.en: To visit the Inca in Peru
options.zh: 为了拜访秘鲁的印加人

options.en: To find a shortcut to the Indies (Southeast Asia)
options.zh: 为了寻找通往 Indies（东南亚）的捷径

options.en: To race the Vikings to Canada according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 为了和维京人比赛去加拿大（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To study pyramids in Mexico
options.zh: 为了研究墨西哥的金字塔

explain.en: Columbus was looking for a shortcut to the Indies and so tried to sail west across the Atlantic.
explain.zh: 哥伦布在寻找通往 Indies 的捷径，因此尝试向西横渡大西洋。

q.en: The Americas are named after which explorer?
q.zh: “美洲”是以哪位探险家的名字命名的？

options.en: Amerigo Vespucci
options.zh: 亚美利哥·韦斯普奇

options.en: Christopher Columbus
options.zh: 克里斯托弗·哥伦布

options.en: Ferdinand Magellan
options.zh: 费迪南德·麦哲伦

options.en: Leif Erikson
options.zh: 莱夫·埃里克松

explain.en: America is named after Amerigo Vespucci, who explored the mainland in 1497 and was later labeled on a German mapmaker's map.
explain.zh: 美洲以亚美利哥·韦斯普奇命名，他于1497年探索了大陆，后来被一位德国制图师标在地图上。

q.en: In Chapter 5, the glossary defines 'perspective' as...
q.zh: 在第5章，词汇表将“perspective”定义为……

options.en: A flat field for farming
options.zh: 一块平坦的耕地

options.en: An old rock carving
options.zh: 一种古老的岩石雕刻

options.en: A point of view or way of looking at something
options.zh: 看待事物的观点或方式

options.en: A circular room for ceremonies according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 用于仪式的圆形房间（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Perspective means a point of view; the book uses it to show Europeans and Native Americans saw 'discovery' differently.
explain.zh: perspective 指观点；书中用它说明欧洲人和美洲原住民对“发现”的看法不同。

q.en: Besides Columbus, which group may have reached the Americas earlier, according to the book?
q.zh: 除了哥伦布，根据本书，还有哪一群人可能更早到达美洲？

options.en: The explorers from China according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 来自中国的探险家（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The Inca of Peru
options.zh: 秘鲁的印加人

options.en: The Maya of Mexico
options.zh: 墨西哥的玛雅人

options.en: The Vikings, from northern Europe
options.zh: 来自北欧的维京人

explain.en: The book says the Vikings explored northern lands and a possible Viking site in Canada is nearly 1,000 years old.
explain.zh: 书中说维京人探索了北方陆地，加拿大一处可能的维京人遗址距今近1,000年。

q.en: Using the timeline in the book, when were the Maya building their giant pyramids compared to Columbus's arrival?
q.zh: 根据书中的时间线，与哥伦布到达相比，玛雅人是在什么时候建造巨型金字塔的？

options.en: Only in the 1900s
options.zh: 直到20世纪才有

options.en: Fifty years after Columbus
options.zh: 哥伦布之后50年

options.en: Long before Columbus arrived in 1492
options.zh: 早在哥伦布1492年到达之前

options.en: Exactly the same year, 1492 according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 正好同一年，即1492年（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The timeline shows the Maya were building pyramids long before Columbus arrived, and the Inca were already flourishing then too.
explain.zh: 时间线显示，早在哥伦布到达之前玛雅人就在建金字塔，当时印加帝国也已繁荣。

options.en: The most powerful Mayan city, with the largest ball court and an observatory
options.zh: 最强大的玛雅城市，拥有最大的球场和一座天文台

options.en: An Inca city high in the mountains of Peru according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 秘鲁高山上的一座印加城市（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A Viking settlement in Canada
options.zh: 加拿大的一处维京人定居点

options.en: The first capital of the United States
options.zh: 美国的第一座首都

explain.en: For hundreds of years Chichén Itzá was the most powerful Mayan city, with a giant pyramid, the largest ball court, and an observatory.
explain.zh: 数百年来，奇琴伊察是最强大的玛雅城市，拥有巨型金字塔、最大的球场和一座天文台。

q.en: The title 'Discovery in the Americas?' includes a question mark. This suggests the author wants readers to...
q.zh: 书名《Discovery in the Americas?》（美洲的发现？）带有一个问号。这说明作者想让读者……

options.en: Ignore the Native Americans completely
options.zh: 完全忽略美洲原住民

options.en: Question whether Columbus truly 'discovered' the land
options.zh: 去思考哥伦布是否真的“发现”了这片土地

options.en: Believe Columbus was first without doubt according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 毫无疑问地相信哥伦布是第一个（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Memorize the date 1492 only
options.zh: 只记住1492年这个日期

explain.en: The question mark signals the book will explore the debate over whether Columbus really 'discovered' an already-inhabited land.
explain.zh: 问号表明本书将探讨一个争议：哥伦布是否真的“发现”了一片早已有人居住的土地。

q.en: The author says we might better say Columbus 'explored' rather than 'discovered' the Americas because...
q.zh: 作者说我们或许更该说哥伦布“探索”而非“发现”美洲，因为……

options.en: People had already been living, farming, and building there for thousands of years
options.zh: 人们已在那里生活、农耕、建造了数千年

options.en: Columbus was the very first human ever there according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 哥伦布是有史以来第一个到那里的人（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He never actually landed
options.zh: 他其实从未登陆

options.en: The land was empty and unnamed
options.zh: 那片土地空无一物且没有名字

explain.en: From the Native American perspective, their families had lived there for generations, so 'explored' is more accurate than 'discovered.'
explain.zh: 从美洲原住民的视角看，他们的家族世代居住于此，所以“探索”比“发现”更准确。

q.en: The Inca built stone roads and long suspension bridges. What was their purpose?
q.zh: 印加人修建了石路和长长的吊桥。它们的用途是什么？

options.en: To measure how tall the mountains were
options.zh: 为了测量山脉有多高

options.en: To connect towns across mountains and canyons and keep in contact
options.zh: 为了连接群山与峡谷间的城镇并保持联系

options.en: To block enemies from entering the empire according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 为了阻挡敌人进入帝国（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To grow crops on the bridges
options.zh: 为了把庄稼种在桥上

explain.en: The Inca were skilled engineers; their roads and suspension bridges linked towns so messengers could relay messages across the empire.
explain.zh: 印加人是能工巧匠；他们的道路和吊桥连接各城镇，使信使能在帝国境内传递消息。

q.en: Why does the author include the Maya, Anasazi, and Inca in this book?
q.zh: 作者为什么在书中介绍玛雅人、阿纳萨齐人和印加人？

options.en: To list European countries only
options.zh: 为了只列举欧洲国家

options.en: To prove Columbus built all their cities according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 为了证明这些城市都是哥伦布建的（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To describe modern sports
options.zh: 为了描述现代体育运动

options.en: To show that many civilizations lived in the Americas long before Columbus
options.zh: 为了说明在哥伦布之前，美洲早已有许多文明存在

explain.en: By presenting these groups, the author shows the Americas were full of advanced civilizations before 1492, questioning 'discovery.'
explain.zh: 通过介绍这些族群，作者说明1492年之前美洲已充满先进的文明，从而质疑“发现”一说。

prompt.en: The book asks whether Columbus 'discovered' or merely 'explored' the Americas. What does the word 'discovery' mean to you, and can something be discovered if people already live there?
prompt.zh: 书中提出：哥伦布是“发现”还是仅仅“探索”了美洲？对你来说，“发现”一词意味着什么？如果某处已有人居住，它还能被“发现”吗？

en: Look at the glossary definition of 'discovery' as something found or seen for the first time.
Consider both the European and the Native American points of view from Chapter 5.
zh: 查看词汇表中“discovery（发现）”的定义——首次找到或看到的事物。
结合第5章中欧洲人和美洲原住民两种不同视角来思考。
